title: Mugland Corruption Network
hook: Mugland's influence reaches through compromised officials and the structures that shield elite crime.
playerSummary: Flint's hunt for justice keeps colliding with a corruption network that protects Mugland and punishes truth-tellers.
gmTruth: Use this thread to tie personal cases to wider institutional decay, showing how officials, enforcers, and business interests keep Mugland insulated from consequences.
